Heritage & Craft

Born from a love
of the ancient arts

Crafted for those who
wear their soul aloud

Aliza Perfume draws from a tradition that stretches across centuries of Arabian and South Asian perfumery — where fragrance is not merely worn, but whispered. Every bottle begins with hand-selected botanicals, precious woods, and rare resins.

Our master perfumers blend the old world with modern refinement, creating scents that linger not just on skin, but in memory. Each fragrance is a signature — unmistakably yours.

12+ Unique Scents
100% Natural Ingredients
5★ Customer Rating

Signature Collections

Find your essence

Three worlds of scent — each a complete universe of emotion, memory, and desire.

01
🌹
Floral Oriental

Aliza Rose

A bouquet of Bulgarian rose absolute, warm amber, and a whisper of white musk. Opens with bright bergamot, blooms into full rose heart, settles into warm sandalwood.

₹2,499 / 50 ml EDP
02
🌙
Woody Amber

Layl Al-Oud

A nocturnal masterpiece. Pure Hindi oud resin wrapped in saffron, dark patchouli, and a veil of vanilla. Intense, intimate, and utterly unforgettable after sunset.

₹3,799 / 50 ml EDP
03
🌿
Fresh Green

Sabz Bahar

The first morning of spring — green tea leaf, neroli blossom, and a cool mist of vetiver. Light yet lasting, this scent follows you like a gentle breeze through a garden.

₹1,999 / 50 ml EDT

Composition

The Fragrance Wheel

Every Aliza perfume is built from layers — top, heart, and base — that unfold over hours on your skin.

Heart
Notes
Bergamot
Rose
Saffron
Sandalwood
Oud
Neroli

Top Notes

  • Bergamot
  • Green Tea
  • Neroli

Heart Notes

  • Bulgarian Rose
  • Saffron
  • Jasmine

Base Notes

  • Hindi Oud
  • Sandalwood
  • Amber & Musk

Voices

Those who wear Aliza

★★★★★

Layl Al-Oud is the most sophisticated oud fragrance I've encountered. It transforms completely over the day — powerful at first, then deeply intimate by evening.

— Fatima R., Mumbai
★★★★★

Aliza Rose was my wedding fragrance. Three years later, every time I wear it, my husband says it still takes his breath away. That is the magic of this perfume.

— Priya M., Surat
★★★★★

I have tried perfumes from Paris and Dubai. Aliza stands with the very best. The quality of the oud and the longevity are extraordinary for the price.

— Khalid A., Ahmedabad
